final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from the "仙剑奇侠传" IP (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "3D animation, Pixar style" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Pixar's character rigging tradition, Disney/Pixar 2010s female protagonist design, DreamWorks' expressive facial topology work; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3×3 grid layout (9 panels total), each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper, consistent framing across all panels
Subject: must include Zhao Ling'er (young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses) as the focal subject in all 9 panels, with the following panel-specific variations:
  top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  middle-left: big smile expression, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn hole in white paper as the consistent framing device across all 9 panels
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 仙剑奇侠传 IP context, 9-panel grid structure, all expression/action/outfit combinations as specified
Avoid:
